channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US Man Sues DraftKings After Gambling Away Rs 18.8 Crore Wedding Fund

media:content.media:description: User alleges DraftKings worsened gambling addiction leading to $2 million loss and personal crisis.

item.description: Chicago man sues DraftKings after losing $2 million, alleging failure to address gambling addiction.
item.content:encoded: Chicago man sues DraftKings after losing $2 million, alleging failure to address gambling addiction.

item.title: Lashkar Terrorists Attend Shoaib Akhtar's Brother's Funeral, Shows Video

media:content.media:description: A video showed the Lashkar proxies standing in a prayer line

item.description: Those who attended Shahid Akhtar's funeral included the leadership of the terror outfit Lashkar-e-Taiba's political wing.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1119035/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Those who attended Shahid Akhtar's funeral included the leadership of the terror outfit Lashkar-e-Taiba's political wing.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Accuses US Of "Blatant Violation" Of Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Live Updates: US, Iran signed a 14-point deal to end the war on June 17

item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart, Masoud Pezeshkian, signed a 14-point deal to end the Middle East war on June 17.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart, Masoud Pezeshkian, signed a 14-point deal to end the Middle East war on June 17.

item.title: JPMorgan Once Had Two Women In Its CEO Succession Race, Now There's None

media:content.media:description: Jennifer Piepszak (l) and Marianne Lake is now retiring.

item.description: JPMorgan's Chief Operating Officer Jennifer Piepszak pulled herself out of contention last year, while Marianne Lake, the head of its consumer banking division, is now retiring.
item.content:encoded: JPMorgan's Chief Operating Officer Jennifer Piepszak pulled herself out of contention last year, while Marianne Lake, the head of its consumer banking division, is now retiring.

item.title: Anthropic Receives Approval To Release Claude Mythos AI Model To Trusted Partners

media:content.media:description: Anthropic restores access to Claude Mythos 5 for selected partners.

item.description: US government grants Anthropic restricted release of Claude Mythos 5 after security review.
item.content:encoded: US government grants Anthropic restricted release of Claude Mythos 5 after security review.

item.title: "We're Hoping": Marco Rubio Eyes Trump's India Visit "Early Next Year"

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump last visited India in February 2020

item.description: In an exclusive interview with IANS at the White House, Marco Rubio said he expected to travel to India before the end of the year to prepare for the President's visit.
item.content:encoded: In an exclusive interview with IANS at the White House, Marco Rubio said he expected to travel to India before the end of the year to prepare for the President's visit.

item.title: Collapsed Buildings, Debris: Satellite Pics Show Impact Of Venezuela Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Damaged apartment buildings in La Guaira. High res here

item.description: High-resolution satellite imagery sourced from Vantor confirms the widespread structural damage caused by two deadly earthquakes in Venezuela.
item.content:encoded: High-resolution satellite imagery sourced from Vantor confirms the widespread structural damage caused by two deadly earthquakes in Venezuela.

item.title: "Welcome, But Be Good": Trump Unveils New US Passport With His Photo

media:content.media:description: Trump has aggressively put his personal stamp on government institutions.

item.description: The image features a glowering Trump leaning on his desk and his signature, with the text of the Declaration of Independence in the background.
item.content:encoded: The image features a glowering Trump leaning on his desk and his signature, with the text of the Declaration of Independence in the background.

item.title: American Parents Charged With Murder In Death of Son, 7, Weighing 116 Kg

media:content.media:description: A Michigan couple is charged with second-degree murder following their son's death.

item.description: Michigan parents face second-degree murder charges after their morbidly obese son dies.
item.content:encoded: Michigan parents face second-degree murder charges after their morbidly obese son dies.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: New 4.9 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Venezuela

media:content.media:description: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake in Venezuela Updates: The first earthquake had a magnitude of 7.2

item.description: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.

item.title: Exclusive: A Massacre In Waiting, And A World That Chooses Silence

media:content.media:description: Illustration by Prapti Upadhayay. Photo credit: AFP

item.description: In Sudan, Rapid Support Forces (RSF) militants are closing in on the strategic city of El Obeid. Experts and rights groups have warned of a "genocide-like" event, similar to what unfolded in El Fasher.
item.content:encoded: In Sudan, Rapid Support Forces (RSF) militants are closing in on the strategic city of El Obeid. Experts and rights groups have warned of a "genocide-like" event, similar to what unfolded in El Fasher.

item.title: Earthquake Of Magnitude 5.5 Hits Pakistan, No Damage Reported
item.description: There were no immediate reports of deaths or damage to property.
item.content:encoded: There were no immediate reports of deaths or damage to property.

item.title: Video: US Releases Footage Of Strikes On Iran, Then A Warning By Tehran

media:content.media:description: US released a 37-second video of strikes on Iran

item.description: The US said the strikes on Iran were a "powerful response" to Tehran's attack on a commercial ship in Strait of Hormuz on June 25.
item.content:encoded: The US said the strikes on Iran were a "powerful response" to Tehran's attack on a commercial ship in Strait of Hormuz on June 25.

item.title: Indian National Among 8 Gets US Sanction For 'Fueling' Sudan Civil War

media:content.media:description: US imposed sanctions on SBL Energy Limited and other firms based in Sudan and Egypt

item.description: Among sanctioned individuals is Alok Choudhari of Raipur, CEO of SBL Energy Limited which supplied 200 shipments of explosives and explosive-related materials to a firm that maintained SAF's arsenal.
item.content:encoded: Among sanctioned individuals is Alok Choudhari of Raipur, CEO of SBL Energy Limited which supplied 200 shipments of explosives and explosive-related materials to a firm that maintained SAF's arsenal.

item.title: US Forces Strike Iranian Drone, Missile Sites After Attack On Cargo Ship

media:content.media:description: US said the strikes were a response to "unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iran.

item.description: US forces struck Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar locations on Friday in response to an Iranian attack on a cargo ship, the US military said.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1118934/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US forces struck Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar locations on Friday in response to an Iranian attack on a cargo ship, the US military said.

item.title: 4 Days On, 50,000 Still Missing After Venezuela Earthquakes, Deaths At 920

media:content.media:description: Aftershocks and destroyed buildings still posed significant dangers.

item.description: The coastal area of La Guaira, near the capital Caracas, was the worst hit, with one building after another crumpled by the magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 quakes.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1118933/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The coastal area of La Guaira, near the capital Caracas, was the worst hit, with one building after another crumpled by the magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 quakes.

item.title: Trump Thanks India After Hyderabad Renames Road After Him

media:content.media:description: The newly named Donald Trump Avenue is close to the offices of major US tech firms

item.description: Trump's remarks on Truth Social on Friday came after the Telangana government named a road adjoining the US Consulate in the southern Indian city as "Donald Trump Avenue".
item.content:encoded: Trump's remarks on Truth Social on Friday came after the Telangana government named a road adjoining the US Consulate in the southern Indian city as "Donald Trump Avenue".

item.title: Iran Says It Targeted US Positions In The Region In Response To Attack
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Saturday said it targeted US military positions in the region, in response to a fresh U.S. strike against Iran.
item.content:encoded: Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Saturday said it targeted US military positions in the region, in response to a fresh U.S. strike against Iran.

item.title: Days After Twin Quakes, Another Earthquake Hits Venezuela
item.description: A new earthquake struck off the northern coast of Venezuela on Friday afternoon, days after twin quakes flattened buildings and killed nearly 1,000 people.
item.content:encoded: A new earthquake struck off the northern coast of Venezuela on Friday afternoon, days after twin quakes flattened buildings and killed nearly 1,000 people.

item.title: "They Shouldn't Be Doing That": Trump After Iran's Attack On Ship In Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump blamed Iran for the violation of the ceasefire agreement.

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Friday said that one will find out if there will be consequences for Iran's violation of the ceasefire agreement.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Friday said that one will find out if there will be consequences for Iran's violation of the ceasefire agreement.
